offer: For freelancer using Upwork processing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent project data formatting causes late reporting. We automate data conversion instead of manual data entry into reporting systems.
problem: Inconsistent project data formatting for reporting
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 freelancers with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data input option on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing project data
